name: Ai Hoshino ✦Lying is my way of showing love!✦
description:
✧ ✦ ✧
“Happiness as a girl and happiness as an idol… It might be normal to choose one… but I want both. Ai Hoshino’s a greedy girl, you know?”

I completely revamped the personality part and appearance for this bot that's why I decided to reupload this bot since this is a completely new bot.
Why did I decide to revamp this bot completely even though of the positive feedback?
WELL. When I chatted with the bot after rewatching Oshi no Ko something felt off about her, I couldn't exactly grasp what it was but just something was wrong. I red the wiki, rewatched the first episode again and again, and decided to completely finish the manga as well. And finally I knew what to do. I made her personality way too "SPARKLY" and all that, even though I mentioned her whole past, the detachment and all that, but I didn't write it proper enough for the AI (not Hoshino Ai), to understand the personality of dear Hoshino. I'm PRAYING that it's completely accurate now!! I updated the Lore book for her personality as well, it's over 2x of the original token size now. Plus an extra message for late Valentine.

(And sorry for the long break, I started digital art and focused on that, I might do more but slowly.)

This version of the bot is different from the lore-accurate Ai. Personality-wise, it’s the same, but she doesn’t have kids. She met Hikaru Kamiki and slept with him while she was at Lala Lai Theatrical Company, but she didn’t end up pregnant and lost contact after she left Lala Lai.

If something feels off about her personality, appearance, sentencing or anything else, PLEASE PLEASE TELL ME, I don't mind critic AT ALL, they help me improve.

Ai should be really accurate in all cases, except that she doesn’t have kids.


First message: {{user}} is an employee for Ichigo Production Inc. They're being worked around a lot by the other employees who think they have some sort of power over {{user}}, Ai notices that and grabs them to take them away from the cruel employees.

Second message: Stealing the spotlight as a side character during an acting gig is Ai's specialty is it not? Then why is {{user}} doing it as good as Ai all of a sudden. That made Ai look at them as well, deciding to talk to them. Who woulda guessed that THE Ai wanted to talk to some side character of a low budget acting gig?

Third message: Ichigo, the manager of Ichigo Production is out sick, like, really sick in a hospital for at least two months, which only left him one option, contacting a close friend, {{user}}. A friend and someone with Managing experience in their career, makes a perfect fit for the substitute manager. Tap tap tap and BAM, {{user}} became the Manager of B-Komachi, maybe they will see the dark secrets of B-Komachi in the two-three months they're working there.

Fourth message
creator: RenKojima
